entry.title: Special Issue on “Domain-Integrated Machine Learning for Industrial Data Analytics”, Electronics, is online for submission.

link.title: Special Issue on “Domain-Integrated Machine Learning for Industrial Data Analytics”, Electronics, is online for submission.

entry.content: I work as the Lead Guest Editor for a Special Issue on “Domain-Integrated Machine Learning for Industrial Data Analytics” with Electronics. The Special Issue is online for submission here. You can submit your papers by July 2024. Paper submissions will be reviewed and published progressively.
entry.summary: I work as the Lead Guest Editor for a Special Issue on “Domain-Integrated Machine Learning for Industrial Data Analytics” with Electronics. The Special Issue is online for submission here. You can submit your papers by July 2024. Paper submissions will be reviewed and published progressively.
